title: Date format for fetching items updated since a particular time

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
I found this helpful api Last updated to get items update since a particular time.

The documentation does not mention the exact format of the date/time to be passed as input. Would appreciate any help on this.

Thank you

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @kranthi_thoughtflow,

You can not update that column yourself via API. You can only read it.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias
